title: Mountain Music
writer: Jack Moffitt, Duke Atteberry, Charles Lederer
actors: Bob Burns, Martha Raye, John Howard
plot: Folksy Ozark girl Mary Beamish (Martha Raye) yearns for the glitter of show business, and for a man. She knows she is anything but gorgeous, but figures that her enthusiasm offsets that small deficit. The hillbilly family of Bob B...
